title: Iran War Live Updates: Strait of Hormuz Largely Closed as Iran Says Parties Are Far From Final Deal
summary_full: Iran reversed course on reopening the strategic waterway, warning it would block transit as long as the U.S. blockade of ships from Iranian ports remained in effect.
summary_public: Iran reversed course on reopening the strategic waterway, warning it would block transit as long as the U.S. blockade of ships from Iranian ports remained in effect.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Says Parties Are Far From Final Deal
